[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def slide(row):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         non_zeros = [x for x in row if x != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         merged = []
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         i = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         while i < len(non_zeros):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             if i + 1 < len(non_zeros) and non_zeros[i] == non_zeros[i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 merged.append(non_zeros[i] * 2)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 i += 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 merged.append(non_zeros[i])
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 i += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return merged + [0] * (len(row) - len(merged))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def slide_up(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return [slide(row) for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def slide_down(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return [slide(row[::-1])[::-1] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def slide_left(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return [slide(row) for row in zip(*board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def slide_right(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return [slide(row[::-1])[::-1] for row in zip(*board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     scores = {
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         "W": sum(slide_up(board)[i][j] for i in range(4) for j in range(4)),
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         "A": sum(slide_left(board)[i][j] for i in range(4) for j in range(4)),
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         "S": sum(slide_down(board)[i][j] for i in range(4) for j in range(4)),
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         "D": sum(slide_right(board)[i][j] for i in range(4) for j in range(4))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     }
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     return max(scores, key=scores.get)

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     # Function to check if there's an empty spot on the board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def has_empty(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return any(0 in row for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     # Function to calculate the score of the board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def calculate_score(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return sum(sum(row) for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     # Function to move the board in a given direction and return the new board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def move(board, direction):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         def transpose(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             return [list(row) for row in zip(*board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         def merge(line):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             line = [i for i in line if i]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             for i in range(len(line) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 if line[i] == line[i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     line[i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     line[i + 1] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             return [i for i in line if i]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         for _ in range(4 - direction):  # Rotate board to align with the direction
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             board = transpose(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board = [merge(row) for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         for _ in range(direction - 1):  # Rotate board back to its original orientation
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             board = transpose(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     # Calculate scores after all possible moves
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     move_scores = {}
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     move_scores["W"] = calculate_score(move(board, 0))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     move_scores["A"] = calculate_score(move(board, 1))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     move_scores["S"] = calculate_score(move(board, 2))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     move_scores["D"] = calculate_score(move(board, 3))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     # Choose the move with the highest score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     optimal_move = max(move_scores, key=move_scores.get)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     return optimal_move

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         for i in range(4):

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             for j in range(4):

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                     new_grid[i][pos] = grid[i][j]

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         return True

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                     score += grid[i][j]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                     if grid[i][j] == 2048:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         score += 1000
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return score

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     def simulate_move(grid, move):

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif move == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             return shift_left(grid)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif move == "S":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             return shift_down(grid)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif move == "D":

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     best_score = -1

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     for move in moves:

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m def strategy(board):

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Flatten the board and count the number of empty tiles
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     flattened = [cell for row in board for cell in row]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     empty_tiles = flattened.count(0)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Calculate the number of merges that can happen
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     merges = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     for row in board:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         merges += max(0, len([i for i in range(len(row)-1) if row[i] == row[i+1] and row[i] != 0]))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     for col in list(zip(*board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         merges += max(0, len([i for i in range(len(col)-1) if col[i] == col[i+1] and col[i] != 0]))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Calculate the potential score increase
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     potential_score = sum(max(1 << cell, 0) for cell in flattened if cell > 1) * 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Determine the direction to move based on merges and potential score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     if merges > 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         if empty_tiles > 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             return "D" if sum(board[3][i] for i in range(4)) == 0 else "A" if sum(board[i][0] for i in range(4)) == 0 else "S" if sum(board[0][i] for i in range(4)) == 0 else "W"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             return "D" if merges > 1 else "A" if merges > 1 else "S" if merges > 1 else "W"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     elif potential_score > 100:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         return "D" if potential_score > 500 else "A" if potential_score > 500 else "S" if potential_score > 500 else "W"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         return "D" if empty_tiles > 2 else "A" if empty_tiles > 2 else "S" if empty_tiles > 2 else "W"

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 row.insert(0, 0)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         return row
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     def move_right(row):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         nonlocal score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         row = [x for x in row if x != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         for i in range(len(row) - 1, 0, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             if row[i] == row[i - 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 row[i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 row.pop(i - 1)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 row.insert(0, 0)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         return row
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     def pick_up_new_tile(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         empty_tiles = [(i, j) for i in range(len(board)) for j in range(len(board[i])) if board[i][j] == 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         if empty_tiles:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             i, j = empty_tiles[0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             board[i][j] = 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         return board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     for direction in ["W", "A", "S", "D"]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         new_board = move_and_score(board, direction)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         score = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         for i in range(len(new_board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             for j in range(len(new_board[i])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 if i == len(new_board) - 1 and j == len(new_board[i]) - 1:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                     score += new_board[i][j]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                     score += new_board[i][j]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         if best_score is None or score > best_score:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             best_score = score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             best_move = direction
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     return best_move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:31411 - game/score:36 - game/max_tile:8 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def slide(row):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         non_zeros = [x for x in row if x != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         merged = []
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         i = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         while i < len(non_zeros):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             if i + 1 < len(non_zeros) and non_zeros[i] == non_zeros[i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 merged.append(non_zeros[i] * 2)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 i += 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 merged.append(non_zeros[i])
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 i += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return merged + [0] * (len(row) - len(merged))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def slide_up(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return [slide(row) for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def slide_down(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return [slide(row[::-1])[::-1] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def slide_left(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return [slide(row) for row in zip(*board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def slide_right(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return [slide(row[::-1])[::-1] for row in zip(*board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     score_up = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     score_down = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     score_left = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     score_right = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     for i in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board_copy = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board_copy = slide_up(board_copy)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         score_up += calculate_score(board_copy)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board_copy = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board_copy = slide_down(board_copy)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         score_down += calculate_score(board_copy)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board_copy = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board_copy = slide_left(board_copy)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         score_left += calculate_score(board_copy)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board_copy = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         board_copy = slide_right(board_copy)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         score_right += calculate_score(board_copy)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     best_score = max(score_up, score_down, score_left, score_right)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     if best_score == score_up:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return "W"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     elif best_score == score_down:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return "S"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     elif best_score == score_left:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return "A"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     elif best_score == score_right:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return "D"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m def calculate_score(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     return sum(sum(row) for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m # Test the function with a sample board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m board = [
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     [0, 2, 0, 2],
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     [0, 4, 0, 4],
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     [0, 8, 0, 8],
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     [2, 0, 2, 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m ]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m print(strategy(board))  # Output should be "W" or another optimal move based on the board state
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m def strategy(board):

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         score_up = evaluate_move(new_board_up)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         if score_up > max_val:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             max_val = score_up
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             move = "W"

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m def move_up(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     def shift_left(row):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         new_row = [x for x in row if x != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         new_row += [0] * (len(row) - len(new_row))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return new_row
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board = [shift_left(row) for row in zip(*board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     changed = False
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     for i in range(len(new_board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         for j in range(1, len(new_board[i])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             if new_board[i][j] == new_board[i][j-1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 new_board[i][j-1] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 new_board[i][j] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 changed = True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board = [shift_left(row) for row in new_board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     return list(map(list, zip(*new_board))), changed
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m def move_left(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board = []
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     changed = False
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     for row in board:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         shift_row = [x for x in row if x != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         shift_row += [0] * (len(row) - len(shift_row))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         for i in range(1, len(shift_row)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             if shift_row[i] == shift_row[i-1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 shift_row[i-1] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 shift_row[i] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 changed = True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         new_board.append(shift_row)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     return new_board, changed
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m def move_down(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board = [row[::-1] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board, _ = move_up(new_board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board = [row[::-1] for row in new_board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     return new_board, _
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m def move_right(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board = [row[::-1] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board, _ = move_left(new_board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     new_board = [row[::-1] for row in new_board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     return new_board, _

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     def slide(row):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         new_row = [num for num in row if num != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         for i in range(len(new_row) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             if new_row[i] == new_row[i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                 new_row[i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                 new_row[i + 1] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return [num for num in new_row if num != 0] + [0] * (len(row) - len(new_row))

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     move_scores = {'W': scores[0::17], 'A': scores[1::17], 'S': scores[2::17], 'D': scores[3::17]}
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     best_move = max(move_scores, key=lambda k: max(move_scores[k]))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     return best_move

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         if col < len(board[0]) - 1 and new_board[row][col+1] == new_board[row][col]:

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                             new_board[row][col] = 0

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         score = sum(sum(row) for row in new_board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         if score > best_score:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             best_score = score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             best_direction = direction

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     return best_direction

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     # Helper function to calculate the score change after a move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     def calculate_score_change(action, board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         prev_board = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         if action == "W":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             for col in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 merge = [0] * 4
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 idx = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 for row in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         merge[idx] = board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         idx += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 idx = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 for row in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if merge[idx] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         if idx > 0 and merge[idx] == merge[idx - 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             merge[idx - 1] += merge[idx]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             merge[idx] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         board[row][col] = merge[idx]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         idx += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         break
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         elif action == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             for row in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 merge = [0] * 4
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 idx = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 for col in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         merge[idx] = board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         idx += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 idx = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 for col in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if merge[idx] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         if idx > 0 and merge[idx] == merge[idx - 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             merge[idx - 1] += merge[idx]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             merge[idx] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         board[row][col] = merge[idx]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         idx += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         break
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         elif action == "S":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             for col in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 merge = [0] * 4
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 idx = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 for row in range(3, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         merge[idx] = board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         idx += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 idx = 3
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 for row in range(3, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if merge[idx] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         if idx < 3 and merge[idx] == merge[idx + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             merge[idx + 1] += merge[idx]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             merge[idx] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         board[row][col] = merge[idx]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         idx -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         break
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         elif action == "D":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             for row in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 merge = [0] * 4
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 idx = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 for col in range(3, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         merge[idx] = board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         idx += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 idx = 3
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 for col in range(3, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if merge[idx] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         if idx < 3 and merge[idx] == merge[idx + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             merge[idx + 1] += merge[idx]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             merge[idx] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         board[row][col] = merge[idx]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         idx -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         break
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return sum(sum(abs(cell - prev_cell) * 2 for cell, prev_cell in zip(row, prev_row)) for row, prev_row in zip(board, prev_board))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     # Calculate the score change for each action
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     max_score_change = -1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     best_action = "W"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     for action in "WASD":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         score_change = calculate_score_change(action, board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         if score_change > max_score_change:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             max_score_change = score_change
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             best_action = action
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     return best_action

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 i = rows - 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 k = rows - 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 while i >= 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if moved[i][j] != EMPTY:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         if k != i and moved[k][j] == EMPTY:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             moved[k][j] = moved[i][j]

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         k -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     i -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             return count_empty_cells() + sum(cell for row in moved for cell in row)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         elif direction == 'R':
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             moved = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             for i in range(rows):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 j = cols - 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 k = cols - 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 while j >= 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if moved[i][j] != EMPTY:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         if k != j and moved[i][k] == EMPTY:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                             moved[i][k] = moved[i][j]

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         k -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     j -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             return count_empty_cells() + sum(cell for row in moved for cell in row)     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     if count_empty_cells() == 0 and not has_potential_merges():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return 'No move'  # The game is over
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     elif score_move('R') > score_move('D'):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return 'R'
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     elif score_move('D') > score_move('L'):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return 'D'

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return 'W'

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m def strategy(board):

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     directions = ["W", "A", "S", "D"]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     best_move = None
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     best_score = -1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     for direction in directions:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         new_board = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         if direction == "W":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             for col in range(len(board[0])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                 for i in range(len(board[0]) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                     if new_board[i][col] == new_board[i + 1][col]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         new_board[i][col] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         new_board[i + 1][col] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         break
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif direction == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             for row in range(len(board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                 for i in range(len(board[row]) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                     if new_board[row][i] == new_board[row][i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         new_board[row][i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         new_board[row][i + 1] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         break
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif direction == "S":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             for col in range(len(board[0])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                 for i in range(len(board[0]) - 1, 0, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                     if new_board[i][col] == new_board[i - 1][col]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         new_board[i][col] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         new_board[i - 1][col] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         break
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif direction == "D":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             for row in range(len(board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                 for i in range(len(board[row]) - 1, 0, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                     if new_board[row][i] == new_board[row][i - 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         new_board[row][i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         new_board[row][i - 1] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m                         break
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         # Flatten the board and count the number of non-zero elements
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         flat_board = [num for row in new_board for num in row]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         num_non_zeros = sum(1 for num in flat_board if num != 0)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         if num_non_zeros > best_score:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             best_move = direction
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             best_score = num_non_zeros
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     return best_move

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:327649 - game/score:0 - game/max_tile:2 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     # Helper function to check if moving in a direction is beneficial
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def should_move(direction):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         new_board = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         if direction == "W":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             new_board = [list(filter(None, row)) for row in new_board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         elif direction == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             new_board = [list(filter(None, col)) for col in zip(*new_board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         elif direction == "S":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             new_board = [list(filter(None, reversal)) for reversal in reversed(new_board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         elif direction == "D":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             new_board = [list(filter(None, col)) for col in reversed(list(zip(*new_board)))]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         # Try to combine tiles
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         for i in range(len(new_board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             if direction in ["W", "S"]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 for j in range(len(new_board[i]) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     if new_board[i][j] == new_board[i][j + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                         new_board[i][j] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                         new_board[i][j + 1] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 for j in range(1, len(new_board[i])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     if new_board[i][j] == new_board[i][j - 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                         new_board[i][j - 1] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                         new_board[i][j] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             # Shift the board to the left or up
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             new_board[i] = list(filter(None, new_board[i]))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             if direction == "W":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 new_board[i].extend([0] * (len(board) - len(new_board[i])))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             elif direction == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 new_board[i] = [0] * (len(board) - len(new_board[i])) + new_board[i]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             elif direction == "S":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 new_board[i] = [0] * (len(board) - len(new_board[i])) + new_board[i][::-1]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             elif direction == "D":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 new_board[i] = new_board[i][::-1] + [0] * (len(board) - len(new_board[i]))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return new_board != board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     # Determine the best move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     if should_move("W"):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return "W"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     elif should_move("A"):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return "A"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     elif should_move("S"):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return "S"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     elif should_move("D"):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return "D"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return None  # No valid move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:445183 - game/score:4 - game/max_tile:4 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     # Function to find the best move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def find_best_move(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         # Check for empty spaces
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         empty_indices = [(i, j) for i in range(4) for j in range(4) if board[i][j] == 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         if empty_indices:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             return "W"  # Move up if there are empty spaces above non-zero numbers
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         # Check for potential merge opportunities
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         for i in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             for j in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 if i > 0 and board[i-1][j] == board[i][j]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     return "W"  # Move up if merge is possible
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 if j > 0 and board[i][j-1] == board[i][j]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     return "A"  # Move left if merge is possible
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 if i < 3 and board[i+1][j] == board[i][j]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     return "S"  # Move down if merge is possible
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 if j < 3 and board[i][j+1] == board[i][j]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     return "D"  # Move right if merge is possible
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         # If no moves lead to merges, move in the direction of the majority of non-zero numbers
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         zeros_in_rows = [sum(1 for n in row if n == 0) for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         zeros_in_cols = [sum(1 for n in col if n == 0) for col in zip(*board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         if min(zeros_in_rows) > 1:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             return "W"  # Move up if there are more zeros above
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         elif min(zeros_in_cols) > 1:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             return "A"  # Move left if there are more zeros to the left
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         elif sum(row[::-1].index(0) for row in board) < sum(row.index(0) for row in board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             return "S"  # Move down if there are more zeros below
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         elif sum(col.index(0) for col in zip(*board[::-1])) > sum(col[::-1].index(0) for col in zip(*board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             return "D"  # Move right if there are more zeros to the right
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         # Fallback move (should not happen in a game with a solution)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return "W"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     return find_best_move(board)

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:109937 - game/score:48 - game/max_tile:16 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     # Function to get the number of empty cells
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     def count_empty_cells(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return sum(row.count(0) for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     # Function to get the sum of each row
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     def sum_rows(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return [sum(row) for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     # Function to get the sum of each column
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     def sum_columns(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return [sum(col) for col in zip(*board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     # Function to get the number of merges that can be made
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     def count_merges(board, direction):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         if direction == 'W':
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             return sum(sum(board[i][j] == board[i + 1][j] for i in range(len(board) - 1)) for j in range(len(board[0])))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif direction == 'A':
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             return sum(sum(board[i][j] == board[i][j + 1] for j in range(len(board[0]) - 1)) for i in range(len(board)))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif direction == 'S':
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             return sum(sum(board[i][j] == board[i - 1][j] for i in range(1, len(board))) for j in range(len(board[0])))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         elif direction == 'D':
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m             return sum(sum(board[i][j] == board[i][j - 1] for j in range(1, len(board[0]))) for i in range(len(board)))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     # Calculate the number of merges for each direction
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     merges = {
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         'W': count_merges(board, 'W'),
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         'A': count_merges(board, 'A'),
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         'S': count_merges(board, 'S'),
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         'D': count_merges(board, 'D')
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     }
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     # Calculate the sum of rows and columns
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     sum_row = sum_rows(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     sum_col = sum_columns(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     # Determine the best direction based on merges and sums
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     if merges['W'] > merges['A'] and merges['W'] > merges['S'] and merges['W'] > merges['D']:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return 'W'  # Move up
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     elif merges['A'] > merges['S'] and merges['A'] > merges['D']:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return 'A'  # Move left
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     elif merges['S'] > merges['D']:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return 'S'  # Move down
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m         return 'D'  # Move right
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858079)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:239427 - game/score:0 - game/max_tile:2 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     # Find the first empty cell and move to it
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     for i in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         for j in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             if board[i][j] == 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 return "W" if i != 0 else "A" if j != 0 else "S" if i != 3 else "D"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     # If no empty cells, move to the most advantageous cell

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     return move

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     # Function to calculate the number of empty cells
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     def count_empty_cells():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         return sum(row.count(0) for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     # Function to calculate the number of lines that can be merged
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     def count_mergeable_lines():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         count = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         for row in board:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             for i in range(len(row) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 if row[i] == row[i+1] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     count += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         return count
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     # Function to calculate the value of the board based on empty cells and mergeable lines
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     def evaluate_board():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         return count_mergeable_lines() + count_empty_cells()
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     # Try all possible moves and choose the one with the highest evaluation
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     moves = ["W", "A", "S", "D"]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     max_eval = -1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     best_move = "W"

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     for move in moves:

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         # Perform the move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         if move == "W":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             for col in range(len(new_board[0])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 stack = []
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 for row in range(len(new_board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     if new_board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         stack.append(new_board[row][col])
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 new_row = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 while stack:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     val = stack.pop()
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     if stack and stack[-1] == val:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_board[new_row][col] = val * 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         stack.pop()
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_board[new_row][col] = val
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_row += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         elif move == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             for row in range(len(new_board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 stack = []
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 for col in range(len(new_board[row])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     if new_board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         stack.append(new_board[row][col])
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 new_col = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 while stack:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     val = stack.pop()
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     if stack and stack[-1] == val:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_board[row][new_col] = val * 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         stack.pop()
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_board[row][new_col] = val
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_col += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         elif move == "S":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             for col in range(len(new_board[0])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 stack = []
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 for row in range(len(new_board) - 1, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     if new_board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         stack.append(new_board[row][col])
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 new_row = len(new_board) - 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 while stack:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     val = stack.pop()

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_board[new_row][col] = val * 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         stack.pop()
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_board[new_row][col] = val
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_row -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         elif move == "D":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             for row in range(len(new_board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 stack = []
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 for col in range(len(new_board[row]) - 1, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     if new_board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         stack.append(new_board[row][col])
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 new_col = len(new_board[row]) - 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 while stack:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     val = stack.pop()

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_board[row][new_col] = val
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         new_col -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         # Evaluate the new board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         new_eval = evaluate_board()
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         if new_eval > max_eval:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             max_eval = new_eval
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             best_move = move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     return best_move

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:171486 - game/score:16 - game/max_tile:8 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Function to find the best move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     def find_best_move(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         # Check for empty spaces
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         empty_indices = [(i, j) for i in range(4) for j in range(4) if board[i][j] == 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         if empty_indices:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             return "W"  # Move up if there are empty spaces above non-zero numbers
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         # Check for potential moves
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for i in range(3):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for j in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if board[i][j] == board[i + 1][j]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     return "W"  # Move up if there are adjacent duplicates
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for i in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for j in range(3):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if board[i][j] == board[i][j + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     return "A"  # Move left if there are adjacent duplicates
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for i in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for j in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if board[i][j] == board[i][j + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     return "S"  # Move down if there are adjacent duplicates
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if board[i][j] == board[i + 1][j]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     return "D"  # Move right if there are adjacent duplicates
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         # No easy move, prioritize merging
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         directions = "WASD"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for dir in directions:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             if eval("find_best_move(merge_" + dir + "(board)) != dir"):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 return dir
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Helper function to merge tiles in the given direction
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     def merge_up(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for col in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             row = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for r in range(1, 4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if board[r][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     if board[row][col] == 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][col], board[r][col] = board[r][col], board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     elif board[row][col] == board[r][col]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][col] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[r][col] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         row += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     def merge_left(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for row in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             col = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for c in range(1, 4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if board[row][c] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     if board[row][col] == 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][col], board[row][c] = board[row][c], board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     elif board[row][col] == board[row][c]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][col] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][c] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         col += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     def merge_down(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for col in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             row = 3
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for r in range(2, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if board[r][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     if board[row][col] == 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][col], board[r][col] = board[r][col], board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     elif board[row][col] == board[r][col]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][col] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[r][col] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         row -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     def merge_right(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for row in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             col = 3
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for c in range(2, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if board[row][c] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     if board[row][col] == 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][col], board[row][c] = board[row][c], board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     elif board[row][col] == board[row][c]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][col] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         board[row][c] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         col -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Execute the best move found
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     best_move = find_best_move(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     if best_move == "W":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         merge_up(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     elif best_move == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         merge_left(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     elif best_move == "S":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         merge_down(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     elif best_move == "D":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         merge_right(board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     return best_move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:73783 - game/score:188 - game/max_tile:32 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Function to calculate the score for a given board state
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     def calculate_score(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         score = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         for row in board:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for num in row:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 if num != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     score += 2 ** int(num - 1)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         return score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     # Function to slide the board in a given direction and calculate the new score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m     def slide(direction):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         new_board = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m         if direction == "W":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m             for col in range(len(new_board[0])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 merged = False
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 new_row = [0] * len(new_board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 index = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                 for row in range(len(new_board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                     if new_board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         if new_row[index] == 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                             new_row[index] = new_board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         elif new_row[index] == new_board[row][col] and not merged:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                             new_row[index] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                             merged = True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                         else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                             index += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858076)[0m                             new_row[index] = new_board[row][col]

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     if board[i][j] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         board[i][k] = board[i][j]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         k -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 for j in range(k, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                     board[i][j] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         if sum_adjacent([val for sublist in board for val in sublist]):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             total_score = sum([val for sublist in board for val in sublist])
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             if total_score > max_score:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 max_score = total_score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 best_move = move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m     return best_move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:161902 - game/score:4 - game/max_tile:4 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     # Function to calculate the number of empty cells
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     def count_empty_cells():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return sum(row.count(0) for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     # Function to calculate the sum of all numbers in the board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     def calculate_total():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return sum(sum(row) for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     # Function to check if the board has any adjacent cells with the same value
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     def has_adjacent_cells():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         for i in range(len(board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             for j in range(len(board[i])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 if i > 0 and board[i][j] == board[i-1][j]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     return True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 if j > 0 and board[i][j] == board[i][j-1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     return True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return False
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     # Function to calculate the highest number on the board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     def highest_number():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return max(max(row) for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     # Determine the best move based on the current state of the board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     if count_empty_cells() == 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         if has_adjacent_cells():
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             highest = highest_number()
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             if highest >= 512:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 return "S" if max(board[len(board)-2]) >= max(board[0]) else "A"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             elif highest >= 256:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 if max(board[len(board)-2]) >= max(board[0]):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     return "S"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     if any(board[i][len(board[i])-1] for i in range(len(board))):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         return "D"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                         return "S"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m                 return "S" if max(board[len(board)-1]) >= max(board[0]) else "A"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m             return "W" if max(board[0]) > max(board[len(board)-1]) else "A"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m     else:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m         return max("W", "A", "S", "D", key=lambda move: calculate_total() + (1 if move in ["W", "S"] else -1) * count_empty_cells() + (1 if move in ["A", "D"] else -1) * count_empty_cells() * 1.5)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858075)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m [2048] game/state:timeout - game/steps:68132 - game/score:0 - game/max_tile:2 - reward/total:1.0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def countZeros(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return sum(row.count(0) for row in board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def countMerges(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         merges = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         for row in board:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             merges += max(row[i] == row[i+1] for i in range(len(row)-1))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         for i in range(len(board)):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             merges += max(board[j][i] == board[j+1][i] for j in range(len(board)-1))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return merges
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def valueOfBoard(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return sum(sum(row) for row in board) + countMerges(board) * 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def moveUp(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         newBoard = [[0 for _ in range(4)] for _ in range(4)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         for col in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             pos = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             for row in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 if board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     newBoard[pos][col] = board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     if pos != row:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                         newBoard[row][col] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     pos += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return newBoard
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def moveLeft(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return [list(filter(None, row)) + [0] * (4 - len(list(filter(None, row)))) for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def moveDown(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         newBoard = [[0 for _ in range(4)] for _ in range(4)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         for col in range(4):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             pos = 3
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m             for row in range(3, -1, -1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                 if board[row][col] != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     newBoard[pos][col] = board[row][col]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     if pos != row:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                         newBoard[row][col] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m                     pos -= 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return newBoard
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     def moveRight(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         return [list(filter(None, row)) + [0] * (4 - len(list(filter(None, row)))) for row in reversed(board)]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     moves = {
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         "W": moveUp,
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         "A": moveLeft,
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         "S": moveDown,
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m         "D": moveRight
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     }
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     scores = {key: valueOfBoard(moves[key](board)) for key in moves}
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858072)[0m     return max(scores, key=scores.get)

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def can_move(board, direction):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         for i, row in enumerate(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             for j, val in enumerate(row):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 if val == 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     continue
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 if direction == 'W' and i > 0 and board[i-1][j] == val:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     return True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 if direction == 'A' and j > 0 and board[i][j-1] == val:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     return True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 if direction == 'S' and i < len(board)-1 and board[i+1][j] == val:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     return True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 if direction == 'D' and j < len(row)-1 and board[i][j+1] == val:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     return True
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return False
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     directions = ['W', 'A', 'S', 'D']
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     for direction in directions:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         if can_move(board, direction):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             return direction
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m 
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     return "None"  # If no moves are possible

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     # Directions: W (up), A (left), S (down), D (right)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     directions = ["W", "A", "S", "D"]

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     max_score = 0

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     def compress(lst):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         nonlocal max_score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         new_lst = [0 for i in lst]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         pos = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         for num in lst:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             if num != 0:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 new_lst[pos] = num
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 if pos > 0 and new_lst[pos] == new_lst[pos-1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     new_lst[pos-1] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     new_lst[pos] = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     max_score = max(max_score, new_lst[pos-1])
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 pos += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         return new_lst
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m     for dir in directions:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         new_board = [list(x) for x in board]

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                     new_board[i][col] = new_col[i]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m         elif dir == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m             for row in board:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 new_row = compress(row)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858074)[0m                 row[:] = new_row

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m def strategy(board):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     # Directions: W (up), A (left), S (down), D (right)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     directions = ["W", "A", "S", "D"]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     max_score = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     best_move = "W"
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     def score_move(move):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         # Create a copy of the board to simulate the move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         move_board = [row[:] for row in board]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         # Execute the move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         if move == "W":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             for col in range(len(move_board[0])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 row = [x for x in column(col, move_board) if x != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 for i in range(len(row) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                     if row[i] == row[i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                         row[i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                         row = row[:i+1] + [0] + row[i+2:]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 move_board = update_board(move_board, row, col)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         elif move == "A":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             for row in move_board:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 row = [x for x in row if x != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 for i in range(len(row) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                     if row[i] == row[i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                         row[i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                         row[i:i+2] = [row[i]]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 move_board = update_board(move_board, row, row.index(row[0]))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         elif move == "S":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             for col in range(len(move_board[0])):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 row = [x for x in column(col, move_board) if x != 0][::-1]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 for i in range(len(row) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                     if row[i] == row[i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                         row[i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                         row = row[:i+1] + [0] + row[i+2:]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 move_board = update_board(move_board, row[::-1], col)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         elif move == "D":
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             for row in move_board:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 row = [x for x in row[::-1] if x != 0]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 for i in range(len(row) - 1):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                     if row[i] == row[i + 1]:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                         row[i] *= 2
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                         row[i:i+2] = [row[i]]
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m                 move_board = update_board(move_board, row[::-1], row[::-1].index(row[0]))
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         # Calculate the score of the new board
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         score = sum(sum(row) for row in move_board)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         return score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m     for move in directions:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         score = score_move(move)
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m         if score > max_score:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             max_score = score
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m             best_move = move
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858078)[0m

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                             merge_count += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         last_cell = cell
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m         elif direction == "A":

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 last_cell = 0

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         if cell == last_cell:
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                             merge_count += 1
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         last_cell = cell

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m             for column in zip(*board[::-1]):
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 last_cell = 0
[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                 for cell in column:

[36m(RewardLoopWorker pid=858073)[0m                         if cell == last_cell:
